lesson: When analyzing FTTH-related metrics, ensure to use the correct KPI name ("DELAIS RESOLUTION FTTH") and its associated metric ("Count of DELAIS RESOLUTION FTTH KPIs resolved under 4 hours") to accurately reflect the desired analysis.
When interpreting tasks involving date ranges, it's essential to consider the specific number of days in each month to ensure accurate filtering and aggregation of data.

When analyzing data for specific time periods, it is essential to consider the availability and accuracy of the data, ensuring that the metrics and assumptions are well-defined and aligned with the actual data.

Lors de l'analyse de données de réclamations résolues, il est essentiel de prendre en compte les définitions spécifiques de métriques et de critères de chutage, tels que le nombre d'appels/sms reçus par le client en 3 mois, pour fournir des résultats précis et complets.
When analyzing revenue for a specific product code, ensure to map the identifier to the correct product name, such as 'internet services' in this case.
